commit_scope: Merge the active sibling branches into the Form parity worktree and add paired kernel async primitives that walk pure recipe roots with ordered parallel execution and optional structural caching where the host kernel can do so safely.

commands: cd form/form-kernel-ts && node --import ./node_modules/tsx/dist/loader.mjs src/parallel.test.ts && node --import ./node_modules/tsx/dist/loader.mjs src/inductive.test.ts
cd form/form-kernel-go && go run -race . --expr '<walk_parallel pure recipe expression>'
cd form/form-kernel-go && go run -race . --expr '<walk_parallel_cached pure recipe expression>'
local_validation.notes: Prompt guide passed with zero blocking continuity risks after merging and removing stale clean sibling worktrees. Wellness passed. Source and binary Form artifacts produced 50 identically across Go, Rust, and TypeScript kernels for both walk_parallel and walk_parallel_cached. The cached proof sums repeated pure roots to 47 and observes 3 structural cache entries, returning 50. Go/Rust/TS focused kernel tests and TS typecheck passed. Maintainability baseline was advanced after explicit review of the full Form runtime surface: 3 layer violations, 43 large modules, 15 very large modules, 112 long functions, 9 placeholder findings, and risk score 958. Go race detector passed on pure walk_parallel and walk_parallel_cached expressions.
